credentials_required: Gmail OAuth2 — same credential as lead-capture workflow.
Google Sheets OAuth2 — same credential + same sheet. Needs 'Follow-Up Status' column in Leads tab.
Telegram API — same credential as lead-capture workflow.
after_import: 1. Replace SHEET_ID_PLACEHOLDER in 'Google Sheets - Update Status' node with your actual Sheet ID.
3. Copy the webhook URL and paste into backend/config.json under webhooks.onFollowUpDue.

_comment: This is a REFERENCE template, not a directly importable N8N workflow. See README.md.
name: AI Sales Agent - Follow-Up Sequence

nodes.name: Webhook - Follow-Up Due
nodes._note: Receives: { conversationId, email, leadData, followUpNumber, hoursSinceChat, bookingLink, timestamp }

nodes.name: Google Sheets - Lookup Lead
nodes._note: Check current lead status. If Status is 'Booked', stop — they already booked.

nodes.name: IF - Not Already Booked
nodes._note: Kill switch: skip follow-up if lead already booked via Cal.com or any other path.

nodes.name: IF - Follow-Up #1
nodes._note: Route by followUpNumber: 1 = soft touch (24h), 2 = last touch (48h)

parameters.subject: =Quick follow-up — {{ $('Webhook - Follow-Up Due').item.json.leadData.name || 'there' }}
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $('Webhook - Follow-Up Due').item.json.leadData.name || 'there' }},

Thanks for chatting with us earlier! I wanted to check in — did you have any other questions about how we can help with {{ $('Webhook - Follow-Up Due').item.json.leadData.role_needed || $('Webhook - Follow-Up Due').item.json.leadData.notes || 'your project' }}?

If you'd like to explore things further, I'd love to set up a quick call:
→ {{ $('Webhook - Follow-Up Due').item.json.bookingLink }}

No pressure at all — just here if you need us.

Best,
The Team

nodes.name: Gmail - Soft Touch (24h)
nodes._note: Follow-up #1: Soft, helpful, low-pressure. Sent ~24h after chat ended.

parameters.subject: =Last note from us — {{ $('Webhook - Follow-Up Due').item.json.leadData.name || 'there' }}
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $('Webhook - Follow-Up Due').item.json.leadData.name || 'there' }},

Just a final follow-up from our conversation. I know timing isn't always right, so no worries if now isn't the moment.

If you'd like to book a call for whenever works best, here's the link:
→ {{ $('Webhook - Follow-Up Due').item.json.bookingLink }}

Wishing you all the best with your project. We're here whenever you're ready.

Cheers,
The Team

nodes.name: Gmail - Last Touch (48h)
nodes._note: Follow-up #2: Graceful close. Sent ~48h after chat ended. No more emails after this.

nodes.name: Google Sheets - Update Status
nodes._note: Update the lead's follow-up status in the CRM sheet.

nodes.name: Telegram - Follow-Up Sent
nodes._note: Notify team that a follow-up was sent.
